节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods related to call management.

Makes a call. Returns {@code true} if the call request is successful; returns {@code false} otherwise. Note that the value {@code true} indicates only the successful processing of the request; it does not mean that the call is or can be connected.
注释信息: @param { string } phoneNumber - Indicates the called number.
@param { DialOptions } options - Indicates additional information carried in the call.
@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - Indicates the callback for getting the result of the call.

parameters.说明: Indicates the called number.
Indicates additional information carried in the call.
Indicates the callback for getting the result of the call.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the call state. If an incoming call is ringing or waiting, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_RINGING}. If at least one call is in the active, hold, or dialing state, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_OFFHOOK}. In other cases, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_IDLE}.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<CallState> } callback - Indicates the callback for getting the call state.

parameters.说明: Indicates the callback for getting the call state.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the call state. If an incoming call is ringing or waiting, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_RINGING}. If at least one call is in the active, hold, or dialing state, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_OFFHOOK}. In other cases, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_IDLE}.

Obtains the call state. If an incoming call is ringing or waiting, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_RINGING}. If at least one call is in the active, hold, or dialing state, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_OFFHOOK}. In other cases, the system returns {@code CallState#CALL_STATE_IDLE}.

Checks whether a device supports voice calls. The system checks whether the device has the capability to initiate a circuit switching (CS) or IP multimedia subsystem domain (IMS) call on a telephone service network. If the device supports only packet switching (even if the device supports OTT calls), {@code false} is returned.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the device supports voice calls; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the device supports voice calls; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a phone number is on the emergency number list. Returns {@code true} if the phone number is on the emergency number list. Returns {@code false} otherwise. 2. Incorrect parameters types;

节点.功能描述: Formats a phone number according to the Chinese Telephone Code Plan. Before the formatting, a phone number is in the format of country code (if any) + 3-digit service provider code + 4-digit area code + 4-digit subscriber number. After the formatting, each part is separated by a space. Returns an empty string if the input phone number is invalid. 2. Incorrect parameters types;
注释信息: @param { string } phoneNumber - Indicates the phone number to format.
@param { NumberFormatOptions } options - Indicates the country code option.
@param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - Indicates the callback to obtain a formatted phone number.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@throws { BusinessError } 8300002 - Operation failed. Cannot connect to service.

parameters.说明: Indicates the phone number to format.
Indicates the country code option.
Indicates the callback to obtain a formatted phone number.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
Operation failed. Cannot connect to service.

节点.功能描述: Indicates the states of call.
Indicates an invalid state, which is used when the call state fails to be obtained.
Indicates that there is no ongoing call.
Indicates that an incoming call is ringing or waiting.
Indicates that a least one call is in the dialing, active, or hold state, and there is no new incoming call ringing or waiting.
Indicates that call is answered
Indicates the states of telCall.
Indicates an invalid state, which is used when the call state fails to be obtained.
Indicates that there is no ongoing call.
Indicates that an incoming call is ringing or waiting.
Indicates that a least one call is in the dialing, and there is no new incoming call ringing or waiting.
Indicates that call is answered
Indicates that call is connected
Indicates the states of Carrier Call.
Indicates the call is unknown.
Indicates the call is active.
Indicates the call is holding.
Indicates the call is dialing.
Indicates the call is alerting.
Indicates the call is incoming.
Indicates the call is waiting.
Indicates the call is disconnected.
Indicates the call is disconnecting.
Indicates the call is idle.
Indicates the call is answered.
Indicates the options of placing a call.
Indicates whether the call to be made is a video call. The value {@code false} indicates a voice call.
Indicates the option for determining if a number is an emergency number for specified slot.
Indicates the card slot index number, ranging from 0 to the maximum card slot index number supported by the device.
Indicates the option for number formatting.
Indicates the country code.
